title: Jumbo Bingo Dabber For Bingo Tickets Red Dauber Dot Pen Easy Grip Non Drip
features: Large, bold bingo marks: this jumbo bingo dabber ensures a clear and distinctive marking of your bingo numbers on game night.
EASY TO GRIP COMFORT The jumbo size provides a comfortable grip for players of all ages, making dabbing those winning numbers a breeze.
DRIP FREE FORMULA Enjoy clean bingo with the convenient drip free design that prevents spills and keeps your cards clean.
Perfect for bingo fans – a must for any bingo enthusiast! This jumbo tabber stands out on your cards and helps you track your progress towards a win.
FUN & FUNCTIONAL This jumbo bingo dabber combines bold marking with a comfortable grip for a pleasant and frustration free bingo experience.
description: Directions 1. Remove the bingo dabber from its packaging. 2. Hold the dabber by its comfortable grip. 3. Press the dabber onto the bingo card to mark the desired number. 4. Repeat until all numbers are marked or a winning pattern is achieved. 5. Clean the dabber after use to maintain its functionality and prevent ink buildup.
